name: New Nordic Healthbrands AB (publ)
summary: New Nordic Healthbrands AB (publ) develops and markets branded food supplements, natural remedies, and related personal care products. It offers beauty products under the Hair Volume and Skin Care brand names; and vitality and dietary supplements. The company sells its products through pharmacies, department stores, health stores, and travel retailer as well as through online stores in 41 countries in North America, Europe, and Asia. New Nordic Healthbrands AB (publ) was founded in 1990 and is based in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
